headerDisplay: For help getting these values, please see the readme at: https://github.com/potmat/homebridge-google-nest-sdm#where-do-the-config-values-come-from Read it carefully, you must follow the instructions regarding the authorization URL if you want events to work properly.

fanDuration.title: Fan duration (in seconds) when turning on the fan.

analyzeDuration.title: FFmpeg Analyze Duration (microseconds)
analyzeDuration.description: How long (in microseconds) FFmpeg probes the stream before it starts outputting frames. Lower values make video start faster (e.g. after a doorbell ring), higher values give FFmpeg more time to reliably detect the stream. Defaults to 2000000 (2 seconds).

probeSize.title: FFmpeg Probe Size (bytes)
probeSize.description: How many bytes of the stream FFmpeg reads while probing before it starts outputting frames. Lower values make video start faster (e.g. after a doorbell ring), higher values give FFmpeg more data to reliably detect the stream. Defaults to 5000000 (5 MB).
